title: 35-lesson milestone
description: Five lessons to the next block!
text: 35 lessons! You read and write stories now. You ask questions. You count to ten. You are a real writer! Only 15 lessons left to your big certificate!
tips: Block 5 will have a big finale

character_tips.anna: 🎯 35 lessons! Real writer status. 15 to the finale!
character_tips.maxim: 35 in. Final block has 15 more. Pace yourself.
character_tips.klavochka: 15 steps to your crown, my hero 👑
